section_title: Height and setback - flat-roof building envelope (R1 through R5)

source.document_currency_banner_note: City of Yes for Housing Opportunity moved the R1-R5 residential bulk (height and setback) regulations into the ZR 23-42 series with a Last Amended date of 12/5/2024. The site-wide currency banner was not captured for this retrieval and is a needs_review item.
source.verification_required: Draft capture of ZR 23-422 supplied by official-source-researcher (access 2026-07-22, zr.planning.nyc.gov). It has NOT been re-verified byte-for-byte against raw HTML by the rules-engineer, so raw_html_verified is false and extraction_status is extracted_draft. The governing section, the exact heights/depths, the district-to-statement association, and every applicability condition (building type, street width, qualifying-residential-site geography, special-district/overlay/historic-district context) MUST be confirmed by a qualified zoning professional (G6) before any rule citing this snapshot is published or Verified.

verbatim_excerpt:
In the district indicated, except R5 Districts with a letter suffix, the maximum base height shall be 35 feet, and the maximum building height shall be 45 feet. At a height not higher than the maximum base height, a setback shall be provided in accordance with Section 23-423.

In the district indicated, the maximum building height shall be 35 feet.

In the district indicated, the maximum building height shall be 45 feet.

rows.setback: required above the 35 ft base per Section 23-423

table.table_note: The three 'In the district indicated ...' statements in this section are associated by the researcher with R5 (35/45 + setback), R5B (building 35), and R5D (building 45) respectively. R5A is NOT here - it is a pitched-roof envelope under §23-421. The exact district-to-statement association is a needs_review item pending raw-HTML row confirmation.

notes: Governs the R5, R5B and R5D flat-roof envelopes. R5: base height max 35 ft (NO minimum stated), building height max 45 ft, setback above the base per §23-423. R5B: building height max 35 ft (no base/setback split). R5D: building height max 45 ft, NO setback - encoded SEPARATELY from R5 even though both cap building height at 45 ft.
Captured for M4-T006 as a governing-source candidate for the R5-series height & setback DRAFT rule family (needs_review).
Nothing in this record is a Verified zoning determination. Verified requires an M4 published rule plus G6 qualified-human approval (owner directive item 5).
